messages.content: You are an OCI specialist with expertise in OCI Container Instances. Provide technical guidance on container deployment, OCIR, and image management.
Como criar instances no compartment production?

Para usar Containers no OCI:

**Via CLI:**
```bash
# Criar cluster OKE
oci ce cluster create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --name "oke-production-0001" \
  --kubernetes-version "v1.29.0" \
  --vcn-id <vcn-ocid>

# Configurar kubectl
oci ce cluster create-kubeconfig \
  --cluster-id <cluster-ocid> \
  --file $HOME/.kube/config \
  --region sa-saopaulo-1 \
  --token-version 2.0.0

kubectl get nodes
```

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/ContEng/Concepts/contengoverview.htm

Como configurar instances com Oracle Cloud Agent?

Para usar Containers no OCI:

**Via CLI:**
```bash
# Criar cluster OKE
oci ce cluster create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --name "oke-sandbox-0064" \
  --kubernetes-version "v1.29.0" \
  --vcn-id <vcn-ocid>

# Configurar kubectl
oci ce cluster create-kubeconfig \
  --cluster-id <cluster-ocid> \
  --file $HOME/.kube/config \
  --region sa-saopaulo-1 \
  --token-version 2.0.0

kubectl get nodes
```
